prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约7398→10084→9686→11500→6532，2022–2024年位次持续后移（从7398后移至11500），但2025年大幅前移至6532，创近五年最佳，波动幅度较大；2025年基准约6532名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年39人、2022年41人、2023年42人、2024年42人、2025年44人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划47人，较2025年增加3人（扩招约6.8%），扩招对位次有轻微后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65名区间，学校综合实力与品牌认知度保持稳定；河海大学近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第52位（较热），短视频平台关注度一般，未出现爆发式关注信号；水利工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A、环境科学与工程A，共3个A-及以上学科，水利领域龙头地位稳固，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业持续高热，与河海大学优势工科方向契合；土木建筑类社会热度明显降温，但河海大学土木工程学科评估A级，仍具较强竞争力；本省2026年考生总数约15.4万人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，物理类考生约11.1万人，较2025年物理类8.37万人增长约32%，考生规模大幅增加加剧竞争；河海大学位于江苏南京，在内蒙古招生占比约1.3%–1.5%，属跨省招生；南京作为东部发达城市，对内蒙古考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移（6532名）的强势表现、2026年扩招3人（约6.8%）的轻微后移压力、以及本省物理类考生规模大幅增长（约+32%）带来的竞争加剧，考虑考生规模激增对竞争格局的显著影响，适度前移修正；预测2026年最低位次约6650名，区间6400–6900名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 7398 → 10084 → 9686 → 11500 → 6532. Rankings continuously shifted backward from 2022 to 2024 (from 7398 to 11500), but in 2025, they significantly moved forward to 6532, the best in the past five years, with large fluctuations. The 2025 baseline is approximately 6532. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 39 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 42 in 2024, and 44 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 47, an increase of 3 from 2025 (expansion of about 6.8%), which exerts slight backward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is approximately 63rd, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years. The university's comprehensive strength and brand recognition remain stable. Hohai University's reputation has been steady in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Douyin popularity ranks 52nd (relatively hot), with general attention on short video platforms and no explosive attention signals. Hydraulic Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, Environmental Science and Engineering is A, with a total of 3 A- or above disciplines. Its leading position in the water conservancy field is solid, providing sustained attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electrical engineering and automation, electronic information/communication, and other engineering majors continue to be highly popular, aligning with Hohai University's advantageous engineering directions. Social popularity of civil and construction majors has significantly cooled, but Hohai University's civil engineering discipline is rated A, still highly competitive. In 2026, the total number of provincial examinees is about 154,000. Estimating a physics category proportion of about 72% in recent years, physics category examinees are about 111,000, an increase of about 32% from 83,700 in 2025. The significant increase in examinee numbers intensifies competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, with an enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia of about 1.3%–1.5%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Nanjing, as a developed eastern city, has some regional attraction for Inner Mongolian examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the significant forward shift in 2025 ranking (6532), the slight backward pressure from the 2026 expansion of 3 students (about 6.8%), and the intensified competition due to the substantial increase in provincial physics category examinees (about +32%), with the significant impact of the surge in examinee numbers on the competitive landscape, a moderate forward correction is made. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 6650, with a range of 6400–6900.

If ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6400), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
